key.name: tiling-enabled-workspaces
key.description: List of 0-based workspace indices on which tiling is active. Changed exclusively from the Preferences panel.

key.name: initial-split-axis
key.summary: Initial split axis for the Dwindle layout
key.description: Direction of the first split when a second window opens on a tiled workspace. Must be "horizontal" or "vertical".

key.name: split-ratio
key.description: Fraction of a split container allocated to the primary (first) child. Applied as the default when a new split is created. Range: 0.1–0.9.

key.name: gap-size
key.description: Pixel gap applied between adjacent tiles and between tiles and the monitor work-area boundary. Set to 0 for gapless tiling.

key.name: min-tile-size
key.description: Windows whose natural size is smaller than this value in either dimension are automatically placed in floating mode.

key.name: float-window-classes
key.description: WM class strings (as returned by Meta.Window.get_wm_class()) for windows that must always start in floating mode on tiled workspaces. Example: ["org.gnome.Calculator", "com.github.xournalpp.xournalpp"]

key.name: debug-logging
key.description: When true, the extension emits structured debug output via console.log / console.warn for tiling decisions (window inserted/removed, reflow triggered, float override applied, keybinding fired). Output is visible via journalctl. Has zero performance overhead when false.

key.name: keybind-resize-shrink
key.description: Decrease the split ratio at the focused tile's parent boundary by the default step (5%).

key.name: keybind-resize-grow
key.description: Increase the split ratio at the focused tile's parent boundary by the default step (5%).

key.name: keybind-toggle-float
key.summary: Toggle floating mode for the focused window
